ccel.title: NPNF2-09. Hilary of Poitiers, John of Damascus

source.title: NPNF2-09. Hilary of Poitiers, John of Damascus

title: Concerning the visible creation.

source.title: NPNF2-09. Hilary of Poitiers, John of Damascus

verses.book: An Exact Exposition of the Orthodox Faith.
verses.text: Our God Himself, Whom we glorify as Three in One, created the heaven and the earth and all that they contain, and brought all things out of nothing into being: some He made out of no pre-existing basis of matter, such as heaven, earth, air, fire, water: and the rest out of these elements that He had created, such as living creatures, plants, seeds.

verses.book: An Exact Exposition of the Orthodox Faith.
verses.text: For these are made up of earth, and water, and air, and fire, at the bidding of the Creator.
